steps.title: Identify what Text 1 attributes backlash to
steps.content: The underlined claim says backlash occurs when public art is not bland—the cause lies in the work's inherent challenge to norms.

steps.title: Match the critics' counterargument to the choice
steps.content: The critics in Text 2 argue that backlash isn't solely caused by the work's challenging nature; it's also shaped by contextual factors like whether the setting primes viewers for appreciation. The other choices either misread the texts or contradict the critics' stated position. That matches choice D — D is correct.
